values: UI is cropped/cut out at the top of the screen on some tablet and more square-ratio devices
We are sorry for inconvenience. Currently we are focused on functionality more than on the visuals of the game. However we plan to resolve this issue with the next big overall UI rewamp.
On some devices parts of the battle UI are displayed on top of the HP/base healthbars and numbers
We are sorry for inconvenience. Currently we are focused on functionality more than on the visuals of the game. However we plan to resolve this issue with the next big overall UI rewamp.
Sometimes clicking connect Pera wallet button doesn't bring up dialog to open Pera app.

Check if you have Pera wallet installed. Double check if you already have Pera app open. Close it and retry. If the issue persists try clearing wallet connect session from the Pera wallet app. (open app, go to settings, click on the wallet connect sessions, delete all sessions starting with beta.cosmicchamps.com)
Sometimes clicking connect Pera wallet button, then going to Pera app and and failing to connect the wallet makes the CC app freeze with spinner active on the button.
Sometimes clicking connect Pera wallet button, opens the app but it doesn't offer you to select the account you wish to connect to.

In Pera wallet app go to settings , 
find "wallet connect sessions" and remove all beta.cosmichamps.com entires.
Sometimes when you click on Pera wallet connect button, the Pera app wont prompt you to select an account.
Return to the game and retry, but this time wait few seconds before unlocking Pera wallet app (when you are taken to it from the game).
If one of the players disconnects during the match they have 20 seconds to re-enter to the match or they forfeit the match.

If you lose internet connection (for "non-trivial" duration) you'll see a popup stating you lost connection.
Clicking on that popup will take you back to main menu where you can hit battle button and get reconnected (this is a temporary solution and reconnect dialog directly ont he battle screen will be added).
Device becomes hot to touch after longer game session

Currently game is not optimised as we are still in development stage. However please do submit a bug report of overheating and state your device details as it will help us narrow down the possible device specific solutions.
It takes long time to start the app for the first time
Currently the update delivery system is not optimised as we are still in development stage. WE will speed up the process significantly in the near future.

Your best bet is to find the Cosmic Champs app icon on your device and long press it, when the dialog shows click on the "i" icon or "app info" button. 
Then search for entry that reads "Storage", click on it. then click on both buttons: "clear cache" and "clear data". And restart the app.
